channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CIPLA] Cipla Ltd Subsidiary Initiates Recall of Lanreotide Injection, Leading to Temporary Supply Disruption
item.description:
Cipla Ltd, in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Cipla USA Inc., will initiate a recall of unexpired batches of Lanreotide Injection. This decision is based on discussions with Pharmathen International S.A. The recall will result in a temporary lack of supply of the product in the market.

  • Cipla USA Inc. to recall Lanreotide Injection batches
  • Temporary supply disruption due to the recall
  • Decision based on discussions with Pharmathen International S.A.
  • Recall in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
  • Lanreotide Injection is a product of Cipla Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIPLA LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [CLEANMAX] Clean Max Enviro Energy to Sell Shares in Subsidiary to TCPL Packaging Limited
item.description:
Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd has executed a Share Purchase Agreement for the sale of shares held in its wholly owned subsidiary, Clean Max Hana Private Limited, to TCPL Packaging Limited. The agreement was signed on 9 March 2026, with an expected completion date on or before 31 March 2026. The consideration for the sale is INR 26,000. TCPL Packaging Limited does not belong to the promoter/promoter group/group companies. The transaction is not a related party transaction and is not part of a Scheme of Arrangement.

  • Clean Max Enviro Energy to sell shares in its wholly owned subsidiary, Clean Max Hana Private Limited.
  • Transaction amount is INR 26,000.
  • Buyer is TCPL Packaging Limited, not belonging to the promoter/promoter group/group companies.
  • The deal is not a related party transaction.
  • Expected completion date is on or before 31 March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [SAATVIKGL] Saatvik Green Energy Ltd Incorporates Wholly Owned Subsidiary - Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited
item.description:
Saatvik Green Energy Limited has incorporated a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) named ‘Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited’ in India on March 09, 2026. The new subsidiary is engaged in the business of dealing in all kinds of batteries and energy storage systems. Saatvik Green Energy Limited holds 100% shareholding of Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited.

  • Saatvik Green Energy Ltd incorporates a Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited
  • Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited is incorporated in India on March 09, 2026
  • New subsidiary deals in batteries and energy storage systems
  • Saatvik Green Energy Limited holds 100% shareholding of Saatvik Power Storage Solutions Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KFINTECH] KFin Technologies Ltd Schedules Analyst/Institutional Investors' Meet in Singapore
item.description:
KFin Technologies Ltd has announced an Analyst/Institutional Investors' Meet to be held in Singapore from 1st to 5th March 2026. The meet will include one-to-one sessions with various funds, institutional investors, and brokers such as Morgan Stanley Investment, Nippon Life India Asset Management, Henderson Global Investors, HSBC Global Asset Management, and Lion Global Investors. The presentation will be similar to the one previously made available on the websites of the Stock Exchanges and the Company on February 13, 2026. The schedule is subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances.

  • KFin Technologies Ltd schedules Analyst/Institutional Investors' Meet in Singapore from 1st to 5th March 2026.
  • One-to-one sessions with various funds, institutional investors, and brokers.
  • Presentation to be similar to the one previously made available on the websites of the Stock Exchanges and the Company on February 13, 2026.
  • Subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KFin Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CALSOFT] California Software Company Ltd. to Hold Emergency Board Meeting on March 10, 2026
item.description:
California Software Company Ltd. has called for an urgent Board Meeting on March 10, 2026, to discuss several important matters. The agenda includes the reconciliation of First and Final Call Money received from the holders of partly paid-up equity shares, constitution of a Monitoring Committee or designation of the Audit Committee as Monitoring Committee for oversight of Rights Issue proceeds and call money collection, approval of conversion of partly paid-up equity shares into fully paid-up equity shares, authorization for submission of documents and applications to NSE, BSE, NSDL and CDSL, and consideration of a reply to NSE in relation to Regulation 48 of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The meeting is being convened at shorter notice due to urgent regulatory and exchange compliance matters relating to the Rights Issue and conversion of partly paid-up equity shares into fully paid-up equity shares.

  • California Software Company Ltd. has called for an urgent Board Meeting on March 10, 2026
  • The agenda includes the reconciliation of First and Final Call Money received from the holders of partly paid-up equity shares
  • Constitution of a Monitoring Committee or designation of the Audit Committee as Monitoring Committee for oversight of Rights Issue proceeds and call money collection
  • Approval of conversion of partly paid-up equity shares into fully paid-up equity shares
  • Authorization for submission of documents and applications to NSE, BSE, NSDL and CDSL, and consideration of a reply to NSE in relation to Regulation 48 of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CALIFORNIA SOFTWARE CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAHLOG] Mahindra Logistics Ltd Appoints Mr. Yash Jalta as Head Fleet Services Business and SMP
item.description:
Mahindra Logistics Ltd has appointed Mr. Yash Jalta as Head — Fleet Service Business and a Senior Management Personnel (SMP) of the Company, effective from 10 March 2026. Mr. Jalta, who joined the Company's subsidiary 2 x 2 Logistics Private Limited in November 2025, has over 10 years of experience in Supply Chain Management and Cost Management. He has a strong record in improving service levels, driving operational efficiency, and managing large scale fleet and linehaul performance. He has completed B.Tech / B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication from Lovely Professional University and an Advanced Programme in Supply Chain Management from Indian Institute of Management Calcutta.

  • Mahindra Logistics Ltd appoints Mr. Yash Jalta as Head — Fleet Service Business and SMP
  • Mr. Jalta has over 10 years of experience in Supply Chain Management and Cost Management
  • He has a strong record in improving service levels and driving operational efficiency
  • Mr. Jalta joined the Company's subsidiary 2 x 2 Logistics Private Limited in November 2025
  • He has completed B.Tech / B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication from Lovely Professional University and an Advanced Programme in Supply Chain Management from Indian Institute of Management Calcutta

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahindra Logistics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [KRN] KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd to Consider Funds Raising in Board Meeting on 13/03/2026
item.description:
KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd has informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 13/03/2026. The Board will consider and approve raising of funds through the issuance of equity shares and/or equity linked securities, with or without green shoe option, by way of a preferential issue, private placement or qualified institutional placement or any other permissible method. The funds may be raised in one or more tranches, in accordance with the applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The Board may decide the terms and conditions of the fund raising, subject to the receipt of necessary approvals, including the approval of the members of the Company and such other regulatory and statutory approvals as may be required.

  • KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd to consider funds raising in the Board meeting on 13/03/2026
  • Funds to be raised through the issuance of equity shares and/or equity linked securities
  • The funds may be raised through preferential issue, private placement or qualified institutional placement
  • The fund raising is subject to the receipt of necessary approvals, including the approval of the members of the Company and other regulatory and statutory approvals
  • Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company has been closed for certain Designated Persons and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SAGL] Spice Lounge Food Works Brings Global Underground Icon Circoloco to India - Mumbai 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd, through its experiential and cultural platform XORA World, announced that it will present Circoloco Mumbai 2026. This marks India’s official entry into the global Circoloco circuit, positioning Mumbai as the gateway to South Asia for the globally iconic underground music and lifestyle brand. The event is scheduled to be held on 19 April 2026 at Jio World Garden, Mumbai, and will feature a curated international lineup of leading figures in the global underground house and techno ecosystem.

  • Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd introduces Circoloco to India through its experiential and cultural platform XORA World.
  • Circoloco Mumbai 2026 is India’s official entry into the global Circoloco circuit.
  • The event is scheduled for 19 April 2026 at Jio World Garden, Mumbai.
  • The lineup includes international artists such as Marco Carola, Michael Bibi, Chris Stussy, MauP, Beltran, Jamback, and Sweely.
  • The event will be hosted at Jio World Garden, a premium outdoor venue with a capacity for 9,000+ attendees.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shalimar Agencies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [STAL] Storage Technologies and Automation Ltd. Approves ₹16.50 Crore Borrowing for Land Purchase and Factory Construction
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of Storage Technologies and Automation Ltd. has approved, pursuant to Section 179(3)(d) and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, borrowing a sum not exceeding ₹16.50 crore for the purpose of purchasing land and constructing a factory building. The decision was made during a Board meeting held on 9th March 2026, which commenced at 05.45 p.m. and concluded at 9.30 p.m.

  • Storage Technologies and Automation Ltd. to borrow ₹16.50 crore for land purchase and factory construction
  • The borrowing is approved under Section 179(3)(d) and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013
  • The decision was made during a Board meeting held on 9th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Storage Technologies and Automation Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [YASHHTEJ] Yashhtej Industries Commences Revenue Generation from 5 MW Solar Power Project under PM-KUSUM Scheme
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Yashhtej Industries (India) Limited has successfully commenced operations of its 5 MW Solar Power Project, which has started generating revenue from 7th March 2026. The Company had been awarded a Letter of Award (LOA) to act as a Solar Power Developer (SDP) for solar photovoltaic power generating stations of an aggregate capacity of 5 MW (AC) under the Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana 2.0. The scheme has been launched for implementation of feeder level solarisation under Component C of the PM—KUSUM Scheme. Pursuant to the said LOA, Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited (MSEDCL) shall purchase the electricity generated from the Project, in accordance with the terms and conditions of the Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) executed pursuant to the LOA. This milestone marks an important step in the Company’s growth strategy and reinforces its commitment towards sustainable energy development and contribution to India’s renewable energy initiatives.

  • Yashhtej Industries commences revenue generation from 5 MW Solar Power Project
  • Project launched under PM-KUSUM Scheme's Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana 2.0
  • Letter of Award (LOA) received to act as a Solar Power Developer
  • Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited to purchase electricity generated
  • A significant step in the Company’s growth strategy and commitment to sustainable energy

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YASHHTEJ | Category: New Launch
